name: Light and Fruity Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package 9-inch graham cracker crumb crust, cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Completely dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
2. Combine cold water and ice cubes to make 1 1/4 cups.
3. Add the mixture from step 2 to the gelatin, stirring until slightly thickened. Remove any unmelted ice.
4. Using a wire whisk, blend in whipped topping.
5. Fold in berries.
6. Chill until mixture mounds.
7. Spoon into pie crust.
8. Chill about 2 hours. Garnish with additional strawberries, if desired.
